steps.t: Gerech the Addled has asked you to help with a cursed child who seems to be a sign for imminent doom to Anfalas. The cursed child can be found in the …
The Huntsman refuses to give up the cursed child. You should intimidate them and scare them away.
The Huntsman has been scared away. You should reason with the cursed child.
Endela has revealed to you the terrible treatment she suffered. You should confront Gerech. Gerech the Addled can be found in Barad Faen.
Gerech forced your hand and has been defeated. You should tell Endela she is free. Endela can be found in the bluffs to the south-west.
